version_description: Full song with riff, chords, solo and lyrics.

versions.version_description: All lyrics with their accompanying correctly named chords. Tablature of main riff and Bridge section. Full lyrics for Coda https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gF5LaVkDhyk.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Run To You - Bryan Adams
Written by Bryan Adams and Jim Vallance
Single released 18 Oct 1984
From his 4th album "Reckless" released 5 Nov 1984

Capo on 2 to match recording, play standard chord shapes (see end)
'-' separates two chords played in one bar

[tab][Intro riff]  
0:00  (fret numbers relative to capo)
e|-----------------|-----------------|
B|-----------------|-----------------|
G|-----------------|-----------------|  (Repeat 3 more times)
D|-----0-----0-----|-----0-----0-----|  (Lead over last 2 times)
A|---2-----2---2---|---2-----4---4---|
E|-0-----0-------0-|-3-----5-------5-|[/tab]

[Verse 1]  0:15  
(riff over first 3 lines of verse)
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]   -    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    She says her love for me could never die.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]     -    [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    But that'd change if she ever found out about you and I.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]  -    [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]  -   [ch]A[/ch]
    Oh, but her love is cold.     It wouldn't hurt her if she didn't know, 'cause,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
    When it gets too much,    I need to feel your touch.[/tab]

[Chorus]  0:45
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]     -     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    I'm gonna run to you,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]     -     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    I'm gonna run to you,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]   -   [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]   -   [ch]A[/ch]
    Cause when the feelin's right I'm gonna run all night,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]     -     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  -  N.C.
    I'm gonna run to you.[/tab]

1:01 Repeat Intro riff twice (lead over second time)

[Verse 2]  1:08  
(riff over first 3 lines of verse)
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]   -    [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    She's got a heart of gold she'd never let me down.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]   -    [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    But you're the one that always turns me on. You keep me comin' 'round.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]   -   [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]  -    [ch]A[/ch]
    I know her love is true,   but it's so damn easy makin' love to you.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
    I got my mind made up,    I need to feel your touch.[/tab]

[Chorus]  1:38
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]     -     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    I'm gonna run to you,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]     -     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    Yeah, I'm gonna run to you,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]   -   [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]   -    [ch]A[/ch]
    Cause when the feelin's right I'm gonna stay all night,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]     -     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    I'm gonna run to you,[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]     -     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  -  [ch]A[/ch]
    Yeah, I'm gonna run to you,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]   -   [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]   -    [ch]A[/ch]
    Oh, when the feelin's right I'm gonna run all night,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]     -     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]   -  N.C.
    I'm gonna run to you.[/tab]

[tab][Solo]  2:05  (absolute fret numbers)
   [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
e|--------------|-----|-----------|-----|-----------|-----|-----------|-----|
